hero.title: Lost in Translation
hero.reason: In honor of Lost Sock Memorial Day, celebrating the little things that get lost in life, this film is a poignant reminder of human connection in the unlikeliest of places.
hero.blurb: A poignant exploration of loneliness and connection, Lost in Translation features stunning performances from its leads. With its thought-provoking themes and beautiful cinematography, this film is a must-see.

released.title: Spider-Man 3
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this film marked a pivotal moment in the Spider-Man franchise, exploring the complexities of heroism and the darker side of power.
released.blurb: The third installment of the Spider-Man series brings together action, drama, and romance in a thrilling narrative. With its iconic villain and memorable plot twists, this film is a classic superhero movie.

birthday.title: Road House
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Johnathon Schaech, born May 9, 1969, starring in this iconic film that showcases his talent as a charismatic and rugged actor.
birthday.blurb: This classic action-drama film features an unforgettable performance from Patrick Swayze, with Johnathon Schaech playing a supporting role. With its intense fight scenes and memorable characters, Road House is a cult classic.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: a famously bad movie with terrible reviews, this psychological thriller failed to impress audiences with its convoluted plot and lackluster performances.
awful.blurb: This mind-bogglingly bad film is a mess of confusing plot twists and cringe-worthy dialogue. With its amateurish production quality and poor acting, I Know Who Killed Me is a laughable attempt at a thriller.
